data.description: Iran Red Crescent Society: 'More than 115,000 civilian units have been damaged or destroyed in recent attacks; a significant portion of which belongs to Tehran province, showing the extent of damages to residential, medical, educational, and even relief centers.'

data.title: Murphy Oil Corporation Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.description: In Houston, the Board of Directors of Murphy Oil Corporation (NYSE: MUR) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.35 per share on its Common Stock ($1.40 per share annually). This dividend will be paid on June 1, 2026, to shareholders on record as of May 18, 2026. Murphy Oil Corporation is an independent company operating in the oil and natural gas sector, with a diverse onshore and offshore portfolio spanning multiple basins, and engaged in extensive exploration efforts.

data.title: Matrix Introduces BlondeMax 9+: The Next Generation of High-Performance Lightening
data.description: Introducing BlondeMax 9+, hailed as Matrix's strongest lightener yet, offering hairstylists the ability to explore new possibilities in blonde hair coloring with assurance. Recently unveiled in New York on April 1, 2026, by Matrix, a renowned player in cutting-edge haircolor and haircare solutions, BlondeMax 9+ is set to revolutionize the field.

data.title: Protiviti Earns Fortune 100 Best Companies to Work For® Recognition for 12th Consecutive Year
data.description: In Menlo Park, California on April 1, 2026, Protiviti, a consulting firm with a global presence, has secured a spot on the prestigious Fortune 100 Best Companies to Work For® list for the 12th year in a row. This recognition underscores the firm's unwavering dedication to maintaining a workplace culture centered on trust and prioritizing the well-being of its employees.

data.title: Omnicom's Transformation Consultancy Strengthens Capabilities with the Launch of Unified Adobe Practice
data.description: On April 1, 2026, in New York, Omnicom, a top marketing and sales company globally traded on NYSE under the ticker symbol OMC, revealed the launch of a new Adobe practice by its transformation consultancy Credera. This innovative practice aims to cater to the changing demands of large enterprises.

data.title: NOTICE ON CONVENING THE ANNUAL GENERAL MEETING OF SHAREHOLDERS OF ŽEMAITIJOS PIENAS, AB
data.description: In compliance with the regulations outlined in the Law on Companies of the Republic of Lithuania, and as per the decision made by the Board, the public entity ŽEMAITIJOS PIENAS, AB (located at Sedos g. 35, Telšiai, company code 180240752) has scheduled the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders to take place on April 24, 2026.

data.title: Dual-Axis Gyro-Stabilized Platforms Market worth $2.99 billion by 2030 - Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, a recent report from MarketsandMarkets™ predicts that the dual-axis gyro-stabilized platforms market will experience significant growth. Starting at USD 1.98 billion in 2025, the market is expected to reach USD 2.99 billion by 2030, reflecting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.6% during the forecast period. Interested individuals can explore 250 pieces of market data related to this projection.

data.title: Biozen Named People's Choice Winner at ACC 2026 Innovation Pitch Challenge
data.description: Biozen, LLC was honored at the American College of Cardiology Scientific Sessions for its progress in cuffless blood pressure measurement. The company was declared the 2026 People's Choice Winner at the ACC Future Hub Innovation event held in Oklahoma City on April 1. This recognition highlights Biozen's innovative approach in this field and showcases their dedication to advancing healthcare technology. The event saw a significant number of attendees, including professionals and enthusiasts from the healthcare and tech industries.

data.title: SweetNight Launches CoolNest® Hybrid Mattress, Delivering Cooler Nights and Better Sleep for Modern Households
data.description: In Wilmington, Delaware, on April 1, 2026, SweetNight, a sleep brand focused on providing innovative sleep solutions to families, introduced the CoolNest® Hybrid Mattress. This new product is part of the CoolNest® Collection, serving as the brand's second flagship model.

data.title: CobbleStone Software To Host Live Webinar on Centralizing Contract Management Across Teams, Departments, & More
data.description: Join the webinar hosted by CobbleStone Software on April 8, 2026, running from 1:00 to 1:30 PM ET. This event aims to showcase the integration of contract management with team centralization, document organization, workflows, and other essential aspects. The webinar is set to take place in Princeton, N.J., with CobbleStone Software, an esteemed figure in the contract management industry, leading the session.

data.title: Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Announces Strategic Shift to Direct Commercialization and Distribution of RYALTRIS® in the U.S., Significantly Expanding Its Innovative Portfolio
data.description: Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Inc., USA has recently launched their first innovative product, RYALTRIS® in the U.S. The company, located in Elmwood Park, New Jersey, made the announcement on April 1, 2026. Glenmark will handle the entire process of commercialization and distribution for RYALTRIS®, which contains Olopatadine.

data.title: EY Survey: Federal Government Agencies' Efficiency Efforts Face Significant Barriers, From Budget Constraints To Outdated Tech Infrastructure and Lack of Skilled Personnel
data.description: Numerous federal agencies are currently struggling with technological modernization as they embrace AI at a rapid pace. These efforts are hindered by existing legacy IT systems, a shortage of skilled workers, and inconsistent governance. An alarming 89% of federal agency leaders acknowledge encountering obstacles that impede their ability to enhance efficiency.
